topic: Every book on my shelf is dog-eared on the same page but I never read them
title: Every Book on My Shelf Is Dog-Eared on the Same Page. I Never Read Them. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every book on my shelf is folded down at page eighty seven. Hundreds of books. I have opened almost none.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open book showing a dog-eared folded corner on a page, a full bookshelf behind, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I collect books I mean to read. Three full shelves. Mostly untouched.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of three full bookshelves in a dim study, neat rows of books, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of stiff unbroken book spines lined on a shelf, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One day I noticed a folded corner. Page eighty seven. Then the next book. Same page.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a folded page corner inside a book, the page number faintly visible, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand pulling several books from a shelf, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: All of them. Page eighty seven, creased soft from folding.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of multiple open books all dog-eared on the same page, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of hands flattening folded page corners in a book, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning they were folded again. Page eighty seven.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of book corners folded down again by morning, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then a sentence on that page was underlined in every book. The same sentence.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an underlined sentence on a book page, dark ink, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It read, you are getting closer. Last night new words appeared in my own handwriting.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a book page with a handwritten line added beneath the printed text, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I boxed the books and left them at the curb.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of cardboard boxes of books left at a curb at dusk, grey light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning a new book sat on my pillow. Open to page eighty seven. My name underlined.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open book resting on a pillow, a name underlined on the page, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
